question:
Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 2x2 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..1, trace(X) = 7.0, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).C = [[3, 0.5], [0.5, 0]]
A_1 = [[-3, -2.5], [-2.5, 2]]
b_1 = -11.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the semidefinite program over a symmetric 2x2 matrix X:
Minimize <C, X> subject to <A_i, X> = b_i for i=1..1, trace(X) = 16.0, and X is positive semidefinite (X ⪰ 0).C = [[1, 0], [0, -1]]
A_1 = [[3, 1.5], [1.5, 0]]
b_1 = 24.0

What is the minimum value of <C, X> (rounded to 3 decimals)?
